name: Kaskada
description: Real-time feature engineering platform for ML using event-based data and temporal query language.

seo.title: Kaskada — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Kaskada: Real-time feature engineering platform for ML using event-based data and temporal query language.

when_to_use: Computing time-travel features from event streams for ML
Building real-time feature pipelines with temporal semantics
Generating training examples with point-in-time correct joins
Accelerating feature engineering for recommendation systems

pros: Temporal query language handles time joins cleanly
cons: Niche tech — small community and talent pool
review.verdict: Powerful when time-series features are the bottleneck; otherwise a simpler feature store wins.
review.best_for: ML teams with heavy event-based streaming feature requirements
review.not_for: Batch-heavy ML or teams without real-time feature pain

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
